description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Visual Studio 2019 that runs on every pull request and push to the master branch. Use two parallel jobs, build_cmake and build_meson, both running on a windows-2019 environment. In build_cmake, check out the code, set up msbuild, restore or install vcpkg, install various dependencies, and then configure and build a project using cmake. In build_meson, check out the code, set up Python 3.x, install meson and ninja, prepare the MSVC environment, and then configure, build, and test a project using meson.
